title: Fragment: May The Limner.
content:
When May is painting with her colours gay
    The landscape sketched by April her sweet twin...
meaning:
This evocative piece by Percy Bysshe Shelley, titled "Fragment: May The Limner.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
